ops.text: Review fixes landed (6 commits, 2e13005f..0aa56230; uv run pytest 3708 passed/4 skipped; gitignore fix = pathspec.GitIgnoreSpec with per-dir accumulation — chose pathspec over git ls-files because the subprocess silently returns nothing in jj workspaces/non-git dirs, forcing the banned fallback chain; I verified detect_languages + anchor_pattern by read and ran the pinning test files: all dots). Docs pass DONE (task #8): installation/project-structure/troubleshooting rewritten for v11 (deleted the 10.x zero-packs migration section + the marketplace-bootstrap-worker section — that machinery is deleted; corrected the attach-warning section: old-layout plugins' packs no longer load at all under the fixed path; added a dependency-unsatisfied section), plugin-packs dedupe paragraph now states scope precedence, packs.qmd bold-bullet strip; slop-cop triaged on all 5 pages (kept voice devices, cleared bold-first-bullets). CHANGELOG [Unreleased] Fixed entry reconciled — but NOTE: main advanced to c785de5e (steering 0.8.0 anti-workaround pair, cc-transcript 14.6.1, v10.6.0 released to PyPI with its heading at 8764d86b). pack-redesign rebase onto c785de5e dispatched to ch-rewrite with conflict guidance (steering changes port into builtin_packs/steering/, [10.6.0] heading keeps its historical wording — drop my reconciled Fixed entry if 10.6.0 owns it, test_packs.py merge). Release pre-flight after the rebase lands.
